GitHub Actions workflow for building and bundling PRF files on push and pull requests to the main branch.

# Purpose
The YAML configuration file defines a GitHub Actions workflow named `Build PRF`. This workflow triggers on `push` and `pull_request` events to the `main` branch, specifically when changes occur in specified paths such as `.github/workflows/build-prf.yml`, `resources/**`, `src/**`, and others. The workflow includes a job named `build` that runs on an `ubuntu-24.04` environment using a specified Docker container image. The job employs a matrix strategy to build for different `board` and `mode` combinations. The steps in the job include marking the GitHub workspace as safe, checking out the repository, installing Python dependencies, configuring the build environment, executing the build process, bundling the build artifacts, and finally storing the artifacts using the `upload-artifact` action.
